message:
fix(alloc,mvcc): rollback partial batch allocations on NoSpace and validate staged block ranges in MVCC merge

- Add rollback loop in alloc_blocks_batch_persist that frees successfully
  persisted blocks when the batch falls short, preventing persistent
  block leaks
- Add strict validation in merge_non_overlapping_ranges that reconstructs
  the expected staged block and rejects merges where staged data was
  modified outside declared touched_ranges
- Rename FlushPinToken test variables for clarity (no logic change)
- Sync beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
